text: 2026-07-10 (D3, Brad): minimal gate scope for v0.1.0 is COMPLETE — gate join fixed (366), signal reclaimed (c4n + hires timer 1e64f85), baseline covers all 15 ops (ho0), coverage-table sync automated (zxn). Remaining children quc (23-script rehab) and 1x2 (reporting) are explicitly post-release; do not block the release gate on them.
